name: web-wavsep
description: WAVSEP (Web Application Vulnerability Scanner Evaluation Project) — the neutral DAST leaderboard. Full 1,133-case ground truth bundled in expected-cases.csv. Deploy the WAVSEP webapp (zaproxy/wavsep, port 8080) and run via `tsbench wavsep --target <url> --ground-truth fixtures/web/wavsep/expected-cases.csv`. Score per-class Youden against WAVSEP's vulnerable + false-positive test cases.

competitors.note: Per-class Youden index (sensitivity + specificity - 1) across WAVSEP test cases. Requires the WAVSEP webapp deployed and reachable from the sandbox; this stub records the competitor numbers so the comparison is ready when the corpus is wired.
